problem_statement.title: kubemark log dump flaking
problem_statement.description:
### Which jobs are flaking?

ci-kubernetes-kubemark-100-gce

### Which tests are flaking?

DumpClusterLogs

### Since when has it been flaking?

March 6th

### Testgrid link

https://testgrid.k8s.io/sig-scalability-kubemark#kubemark-100&width=20

### Reason for failure (if possible)

> Error from server (InternalError): an error on the server ("An error has occurred while serving metrics:\n\ncollected metric \"kubelet_container_log_filesystem_used_bytes\" { label:{name:\"container\"  value:\"hollow-proxy\"}  label:{name:\"namespace\"  value:\"kubemark\"}  label:{name:\"pod\"  value:\"hollow-node-jlglr\"}  label:{name:\"uid\"  value:\"d43e3a5a-40c3-427c-b3b9-69a3aab282dd\"}  gauge:{value:8192}} was collected before with the same name and label values") has prevented the request from succeeding


### Anything else we need to know?

_No response_

### Relevant SIG(s)

/sig scalability instrumentation testing
